title: Anthropic Retired Claude Sonnet 4 And Claude Opus 4 API Models
summary: Anthropic release notes say Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 API model IDs were retired on June 15, 2026, with requests to those IDs now returning errors and recommended upgrades to Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official source reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Remove retired Claude Sonnet 4 and Claude Opus 4 IDs from routing allowlists and migrate pinned traffic to supported successor models.
Audit applications, gateways, and eval fixtures for pinned claude-sonnet-4-20250514 or claude-opus-4-20250514 model IDs before retrying failed requests.

detail.migration_notes: This event records API model retirement from Anthropic release notes. Researchers may have separate access paths; APW does not assert eligibility for exceptions.

limitations: APW records official release-note metadata only, not account-specific exception eligibility.
The release-note candidate also mentioned successor models; APW records them as replacement refs, not as new launches.
